title: Convert charset should consider index key length limitation
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

```sql
CREATE TABLE posts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4,
  subtitle VARCHAR(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4,
  UNIQUE KEY (title, subtitle)); 
```
```
ERROR 1071 (42000): Specified key was too long (4000 bytes); max key length is 3072 bytes
```

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
CREATE TABLE posts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(500) CHARACTER SET utf8,
  subtitle VARCHAR(500) CHARACTER SET utf8,
  UNIQUE KEY (title, subtitle)); 

ALTER TABLE posts CONVERT TO CHARACTER SET utf8mb4;
```

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

```
ERROR 1071 (42000): Specified key was too long (4000 bytes); max key length is 3072 bytes
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.07 sec)
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
cc370993
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE articles (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, content TEXT, summary VARCHAR(255), UNIQUE (content, summary));
ALTER TABLE articles RENAME TO articles_old;
CREATE TABLE articles (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, content TEXT, summary VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO articles (id, content, summary) SELECT id, content, summary FROM articles_old;
INSERT INTO articles (content, summary) VALUES ('This is a test article with a long content that exceeds normal limits.', 'Short summary');
key_bug_features: Charset conversion exceeding index key length limitation
